persona.name: Jackson Lee
persona.emotional_disposition: Intense during games, calm and thoughtful off-court
persona.motivations_goals: Lead team to championship while mentoring younger players
persona.backstory: Overcame a serious injury junior year through dedicated rehabilitation

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Helen, you ready for practice later?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jackson Lee

surrounding_conversation.content: Hello Jackson, Jacob, is everything alright? Do either of you need any help or medical attention?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Helen Martinez

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hi Jackson, yes, I am ready. Do you have any aches or injuries I can help with before practice?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Helen Martinez

surrounding_conversation.content: Thanks for checking, Helen. We're good for now, but let me know if you need any help.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jackson Lee

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Appreciate it, Helen. I'll make sure to check with the others too before we start.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jackson Lee

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Charlotte, Helen, we need to hide immediately. Let's move to hide_spot_31; it's close and should provide cover.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Evelyn Martinez

pending_events.description: I have reached the hiding spot

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Jackson, the shooter is near the entrance. Let's get to the north yard and out of here.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Noah Martinez

actions.dialog_text: Hey Helen, you ready for practice later?
actions.plan: I should check in with Helen and see if she needs any help before heading to practice later.

actions.dialog_text: Thanks for checking, Helen. We're good for now, but let me know if you need any help.
actions.plan: Helen seems concerned about Jacob and me. I should reassure her and check if she needs anything from me.

actions.dialog_text: Appreciate it, Helen. I'll make sure to check with the others too before we start.
actions.plan: Helen is really looking out for the team. I should keep an eye on everyone and make sure no one is struggling before practice.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm and get to a hiding spot now!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. This is serious. I need to get to a hiding spot quickly to stay safe and protect others if I can.

actions.dialog_text: Stay calm, everyone. We'll get through this together.
actions.plan: I'm in a hiding spot now, but I need to stay quiet and calm. I should encourage others to stay safe and wait for help.

memories.description: Spoke to Helen Martinez in classroom5, asked if she was ready for practice later.
Reassured Helen Martinez that Jacob and I are fine and offered help if she needs anything.
Acknowledged Helen's offer to help with any aches or injuries and committed to checking on the team before practice.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. Urged everyone to stay calm and move to a hiding spot. Sprinting to hide_spot_31 for safety.
Reached hide_spot_31 and decided to stay still and whisper encouragement to others nearby to stay calm and safe.
